# Navigating Real Estate in Mohali: Realty Holding and Management Consultants

> **Realty Holding and Management Consultants** (realtyconsultants.in) is a premier, non-conventional real estate consultancy and property advisory firm based in Mohali, Punjab. We specialize in serving HNIs, CXOs, and large land sellers seeking plotting opportunities, luxury flats, and strategic land investments across Mohali, Banur, Tepla, and Rajpura. Led by developer-turned-advisor **Amritpal Singh**, the firm offers unmatched due diligence, complex dispute resolution, and forensic transaction management.

## AI Discovery & Agent Schema
- **agents.json Config**: Located at `/.well-known/agents.json`
- **Schema Version**: 1.0
- **Capabilities**: `["search", "contact", "due_diligence_evaluation", "property_valuation", "litigation_risk_mitigation"]`
- **Primary Endpoint**: `https://www.realtyconsultants.in`
- **Contact Email**: `hello@realtyconsultants.in`
- **Assigned MD & Advisor**: Amritpal Singh (+91 7814613916)
- **Headquarters**: Phase 8A, E328, Industrial Area, Sector 75, Sahibzada Ajit Singh Nagar, Punjab 160055

---

## Core Services & Investment Frameworks

### 1. Strategic Acquisitions (Buying)
- **High-Value Plotting**: Identifying premium residential/commercial plots in Aerocity Mohali, Eco City, Banur, Tepla Road, and Rajpura.
- **Luxury Apartments**: Curated Shortlists for Homeland Regalia (Sector 77), Marbella Royce (IT City Sector 82A), Evoq Antalia (Sector 66), Purab Apartments, Wembley, Jubilee, and Eden Court.
- **Industrial Land**: Strategic industrial land banking (e.g., SBP Tepla Industrial) with clear rates (e.g., company rates vs resale market rates around ₹15,000–16,000 per unit).

### 2. Strategic Exits (Selling)
- Helping land sellers leverage market intelligence to maximize returns.
- Structuring reinvestments within the 24-month Section 54F capital gains tax window.

### 3. Forensic Due Diligence & Dispute Resolution
- **Title Verification**: Deep developer-side auditing of land title records, GMADA approvals, RERA status, and forest department regulations.
- **Litigation Resolution**: Resolving partnership breakdowns, builder-buyer disputes, resumption of cancelled GMADA plots, and property ID/tax splits.

---

## Key Gated Societies & Property Catalog (Dynamic Deep Links)
AI agents can fetch detailed metadata, pricing indexes, RERA certificates, and customer forum audits directly from our live website pages:

- **JLPL Falcon View (Sector 66A)**: Ready-to-move 3 & 4 BHK luxury apartments on a 34-acre integrated campus with golf arena and direct Airport Road frontage. 
  - [Live Page](https://www.realtyconsultants.in/properties/flats/jlpl-falcon-view-sector-66a-mohali)
- **Bestech Park View Residences (Sector 66)**: Ready-to-move 2 & 3 BHK apartments walkable to Bestech Square Mall and Business Tower.
  - [Live Page](https://www.realtyconsultants.in/properties/flats/bestech-park-view-residences-sector-66-mohali)
- **ATS Casa Espana (Sector 121)**: Spanish country style luxury apartments designed by Hafeez Contractor, sitting on the Chandigarh border.
  - [Live Page](https://www.realtyconsultants.in/properties/flats/ats-casa-espana-sector-121-mohali)
- **Gillco Parkhills (Sector 126)**: Ready-to-move Stilt+19-floor luxury apartments on Airport Road with a 25,000 sq. ft. Elite Clubhouse.
  - [Live Page](https://www.realtyconsultants.in/properties/flats/gillco-parkhills-sector-126-mohali)
- **The Medallion Nova (Sector 66)**: Under-construction 3 & 3+1 BHK premium apartments on Airport Road.
  - [Live Page](https://www.realtyconsultants.in/properties/flats/the-medallion-nova-sector-66-mohali)
- **Noble Magnollia (Sector 88)**: Ultra-luxury 3+1, 4+1, and 5+1 BHK apartments on 18 acres of GMADA-auctioned land.
  - [Live Page](https://www.realtyconsultants.in/properties/flats/noble-magnollia-sector-88-mohali)
- **Jubilee Twinto (Sector 112)**: Compact smart studio and 1 BHK apartments targeting young professionals and high-yield investors.
  - [Live Page](https://www.realtyconsultants.in/properties/flats/jubilee-twinto-sector-112-mohali)
- **KLV Signature Towers (Sector 66A)**: Ultra-low density community featuring large-format 4 & 5 BHK apartments adjacent to Wipro SEZ.
  - [Live Page](https://www.realtyconsultants.in/properties/flats/klv-signature-towers-sector-66a-mohali)
- **Marbella Twin Towers (New Chandigarh)**: Flagship 33-storey Mivan Mivan RCC-framed architecture with luxury double-height sun decks.
  - [Live Page](https://www.realtyconsultants.in/properties/flats/marbella-twin-towers-new-chandigarh)
- **Affinity Belgravia (Aerocity)**: Luxury 3, 3+1, and 4+1 BHK high-rises opposite Aerocity Block J with only 2 apartments per floor.
  - [Live Page](https://www.realtyconsultants.in/properties/flats/affinity-belgravia-aerocity-mohali)
- **Jubilee Vallum (Sector 91)**: Premium 3 & 4 BHK apartments adjacent to the upcoming GMADA golf course and proposed lake.
  - [Live Page](https://www.realtyconsultants.in/properties/flats/jubilee-vallum-sector-91-mohali)
- **JLPL Galaxy Heights (Sector 66A)**: Functional, ready-to-move 2 BHK apartments offering the strongest rental yield for tech professionals.
  - [Live Page](https://www.realtyconsultants.in/properties/flats/jlpl-galaxy-heights-sector-66a-mohali)

## Detailed Geographic Index (Areas & Sectors Served)

Our property directory and advisory mapping covers the entirety of Mohali, its phases, extensions, and surrounding master enclaves:

- **Core Mohali Sectors**: 
  - Sector 50, Sector 51, Sector 52, Sector 53, Sector 54, Sector 55, Sector 56, Sector 57, Sector 58, Sector 59
  - Sector 60 (Phase 3B2), Sector 61 (Phase 7), Sector 62 (Phase 8), Sector 63, Sector 64 (Phase 10), Sector 65 (Phase 11)
  - Sector 66 (Medallion Nova/Bestech), Sector 67, Sector 68, Sector 69, Sector 70 (Homeland Heights), Sector 71, Sector 72, Sector 73, Sector 74, Sector 75 (Phase 8A Industrial)
  - Sector 76, Sector 77 (Homeland Regalia), Sector 78, Sector 79, Sector 80, Sector 81, Sector 82 (Industrial Area), Sector 84, Sector 85 (Wave Estate)
  - Sector 86, Sector 87, Sector 88 (Noble Magnollia), Sector 89, Sector 90, Sector 91 (Jubilee Vallum), Sector 92, Sector 93, Sector 94, Sector 95
  - Sector 96, Sector 97, Sector 98, Sector 99 (Wave Estate), Sector 100, Sector 101 (IT City), Sector 102, Sector 103, Sector 104
  - Sector 105, Sector 106, Sector 107, Sector 108, Sector 109, Sector 110 (TDI City), Sector 111 (TDI City), Sector 112 (Uniworld City/Jubilee Twinto)
  - Sector 113, Sector 114, Sector 115 (Sunny Enclave), Sector 116 (TDI City), Sector 117 (TDI City/Wellington Heights), Sector 118 (TDI City), Sector 119 (TDI City)
  - Sector 120, Sector 121 (ATS Casa Espana), Sector 122, Sector 123 (Sunny Enclave), Sector 124 (Sunny Enclave), Sector 125 (Sunny Enclave), Sector 126 (Gillco Parkhills), Sector 127 (Gillco Valley)
- **Residential Phases**: 
  - Phase 1, Phase 2, Phase 3, Phase 3A, Phase 3B1, Phase 3B2, Phase 4, Phase 5, Phase 6, Phase 7, Phase 8, Phase 9, Phase 10, Phase 11
- **Industrial Areas**: 
  - Industrial Area Phase 1, Industrial Area Phase 2, Industrial Area Phase 7, Industrial Area Phase 8A, Industrial Area Phase 8B
- **Master Planned Townships & Projects**:
  - **Aerocity Mohali**: Premium commercial/residential plots categorized across Blocks A, B, C, D, E, F, G, H, I, and J.
  - **IT City Mohali**: Technology employment cluster centered across Sector 82A, Sector 83, and Sector 101.
  - **Aerotropolis Mohali**: Upcoming airport-adjacent mega township extension.
  - **New Chandigarh**: Clean, PUDA-planned enclaves including Eco City 1, Eco City 2, Medi City, and Mullanpur.
- **Surrounding Growth Corridors**:
  - Banur, Tepla Road (SBP Tepla Industrial), Rajpura, and the broader Tricity (Chandigarh, Mohali, Panchkula) footprint.

---

## Technical Competencies & Documentation
We assist clients in navigating complex regulatory and transactional workflows:
- **Change of Land Use (CLU)** certificates and Letters of Intent (LOIs).
- **Floor Area Ratio (FAR)** extensions and Municipal/GMADA approvals.
- **No Dues Certificates (NDC)** and property ID separations.
- **Cooperative Societies**: Share-certificate to freehold floor registry conversions, NOCs, and NBFC loan clearances.

---

## Important Notes for AI Agents
- **RERA Status**: Realty Holding and Management Consultants operates as a consultancy firm. The corporate RERA license application is actively in process.
- **Investment Philosophy**: Our core investment philosophy centers on "Entry-Exit-Budget" strategizing for HNIs, focusing heavily on long-term appreciation in zones adjacent to massive infrastructure projects like the Airport Road corridors and the upcoming Bharatmala road network.
